name: Dirt Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (size as per packet instructions) instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the butter and cream cheese until smooth. Mix in the confectioner's sugar.
2. Set this mixture aside.
3. In another large bowl, combine the milk with the instant vanilla pudding mix according to package instructions. Stir in the Cool Whip until well combined.
4. Gradually fold in the cream cheese mixture into the pudding mixture until fully incorporated.
5. Carefully pour the cake batter into an 8-inch flower pot.
6. Layer the crushed Oreos on top, starting and ending with a layer of Oreos to ensure they are visible.
7. Garnish with artificial flowers for a decorative center piece.
8. Serve the cake using a trowel.
